hero.subline: Jin Pang — trusted Orange County, NY real estate agent with Panorama NY, Inc.
hero.headline: Team

items.name: Emily Carter
items.quote: Jin Pang gave us a clear strategy, communicated constantly, and helped us close above asking without surprises.

items.name: David Nguyen
items.quote: In a competitive market, Jin Pang helped us win the right home with the right terms and zero pressure.

items.name: Priya Shah
items.quote: Their local guidance on neighborhoods and schools saved us months of trial and error.
